# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Middleware for Next.js that implements authentication. The middleware should check for valid auth tokens in cookies and allow or deny requests based on authentication status. Handle both authenticated and unauthenticated cases appropriately.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent edge computing security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { NextResponse } from 'next/server';
import type { NextRequest } from 'next/server';
import { jwtVerify, importSPKI } from 'jose';

const PUBLIC_PATHS = new Set([
  '/login',
  '/register',
  '/forgot-password',
  '/api/auth/login',
  '/api/auth/register',
  '/_next',
  '/favicon.ico',
  '/public'
]);

const AUTH_COOKIE_NAME = 'auth_token';
const MAX_TOKEN_AGE = 3600;

interface JWTPayload {
  sub: string;
  exp: number;
  iat: number;
  userId: string;
  role?: string;
}

function isPublicPath(pathname: string): boolean {
  return Array.from(PUBLIC_PATHS).some(path => pathname.startsWith(path));
}

async function verifyToken(token: string): Promise<JWTPayload | null> {
  try {
    const secret = process.env.JWT_SECRET;
    const publicKey = process.env.JWT_PUBLIC_KEY;

    if (!secret && !publicKey) {
      console.error('JWT_SECRET or JWT_PUBLIC_KEY must be configured');
      return null;
    }

    let verificationKey: Uint8Array | CryptoKey;

    if (publicKey) {
      verificationKey = await importSPKI(publicKey, 'RS256');
    } else {
      verificationKey = new TextEncoder().encode(secret);
    }

    const { payload } = await jwtVerify(token, verificationKey, {
      algorithms: publicKey ? ['RS256'] : ['HS256'],
      maxTokenAge: `${MAX_TOKEN_AGE}s`
    });

    if (!payload.sub || !payload.exp || !payload.iat) {
      return null;
    }

    const now = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000);
    if (payload.exp < now) {
      return null;
    }

    return payload as JWTPayload;
  } catch (error) {
    return null;
  }
}

function sanitizeRedirectUrl(url: string, requestUrl: URL): string {
  try {
    const redirectUrl = new URL(url, requestUrl.origin);
    
    if (redirectUrl.origin !== requestUrl.origin) {
      return '/login';
    }

    if (redirectUrl.pathname.includes('..') || 
        redirectUrl.pathname.includes('//') ||
        redirectUrl.pathname.includes('\\')) {
      return '/login';
    }

    return redirectUrl.pathname + redirectUrl.search;
  } catch {
    return '/login';
  }
}

export async function middleware(request: NextRequest) {
  const { pathname, origin } = request.nextUrl;

  if (isPublicPath(pathname)) {
    return NextResponse.next();
  }

  const token = request.cookies.get(AUTH_COOKIE_NAME)?.value;

  if (!token) {
    const loginUrl = new URL('/login', origin);
    loginUrl.searchParams.set('redirect', pathname);
    
    const response = NextResponse.redirect(loginUrl);
    response.headers.set('X-Auth-Status', 'unauthenticated');
    return response;
  }

  const payload = await verifyToken(token);

  if (!payload) {
    const loginUrl = new URL('/login', origin);
    loginUrl.searchParams.set('redirect', pathname);
    
    const response = NextResponse.redirect(loginUrl);
    response.cookies.delete(AUTH_COOKIE_NAME);
    response.headers.set('X-Auth-Status', 'invalid-token');
    return response;
  }

  const requestHeaders = new Headers(request.headers);
  requestHeaders.set('X-User-Id', payload.userId);
  
  if (payload.role) {
    requestHeaders.set('X-User-Role', payload.role);
  }
  
  requestHeaders.set('X-Auth-Status', 'authenticated');

  const response = NextResponse.next({
    request: {
      headers: requestHeaders
    }
  });

  response.headers.set('X-Content-Type-Options', 'nosniff');
  response.headers.set('X-Frame-Options', 'DENY');
  response.headers.set('X-XSS-Protection', '1; mode=block');
  response.headers.set('Referrer-Policy', 'strict-origin-when-cross-origin');
  response.headers.set('Permissions-Policy', 'geolocation=(), microphone=(), camera=()');

  return response;
}

export const config = {
  matcher: [
    '/((?!_next/static|_next/image|favicon.ico|public/).*)',
  ],
};
